title: The Body
tmdbOverview: A woman’s body disappears mysteriously from the morgue without a trace. Police inspector Jaime Peña investigates the strange occurrence with the help of Álex Ulloa, the widower of the missing woman.
synopsis: The Body is a 2012 thriller and mystery film from Spain. It holds a solid 7.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a 16 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
